diagrams.title: Message Queue Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows how producers send messages to queue and consumers receive from queue
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the basic flow and components of message queue systems

diagrams.title: Circular Queue Implementation
diagrams.description: Visual representation of circular queue with front and rear pointers showing index wrapping
elements: Empty state vs Full state detection
diagrams.purpose: Understanding circular queue operations and index management

diagrams.title: Producer-Consumer Synchronization
diagrams.description: Shows synchronization primitives (semaphores and mutex) protecting shared queue access
diagrams.purpose: Understanding synchronization mechanisms for thread/process coordination
